code:
import pandas as pd

def answer_question(df):
    bachelor_earnings = df.loc[df['Degree'] == "Bachelor's Degree", 'Median_Weekly_Earnings_2022'].values[0]
    high_school_earnings = df.loc[df['Degree'] == "High School Diploma", 'Median_Weekly_Earnings_2022'].values[0]
    return bachelor_earnings, high_school_earnings
